channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Iranian lawmaker pushes Hormuz toll plan as peace talks stall
item.description: Iranian lawmaker pushes Hormuz toll plan as US-Israel peace talks stall with Iran. US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Iranian lawmaker pushes Hormuz toll plan as peace talks stall The Times of India.

item.title: Japan to tighten rules for shareholder proposals amid pushback against activism
item.description: Japan tightens rules for shareholder proposals amid pushback against activism. Japan to tighten rules for shareholder proposals amid pushback against activism.

item.title: Iran US War News Live Updates: Araghchi to meet Putin; Trump says Tehran can call for talks
item.description: Araghchi meets Putin as Trump says Tehran can call for talks with the US. Iran US War News Live Updates: Araghchi to meet Putin; Trump says Tehran can call for talks.

item.title: UAE-Iran differences and India’s plans to dilute language on Israel-Palestine derail joint
item.description: India issues a Chair's Statement after diplomats failed to agree on a joint statement. Deeply polarised deputy FMs meeting in Delhi spell trouble for India’s BRICS Presidency; as the language of a joint statement eluded diplomats, India issued a ‘Chair’s Statement’ that reflected the subjects discussed.

item.title: Trump Event Shooting LIVE Updates: Accused Shooter Likely Targeted Trump And His Top Officials
item.description: Donald Trump was evacuated after gunshots were heard at his event in the US. Trump event shooting Live Updates: Donald Trump was evacuated after gunshots were heard at his event.

item.title: Who Was Sheikh Yousuf Afridi, Lashkar Terrorist Shot Dead By Gunmen In Pakistan
item.description: Lashkar terrorist Sheikh Yousuf Afridi was shot dead by gunmen in Pakistan. Afridi was a close associate of LeT commander Hafiz Saeed. Afridi was a close associate of the LeT commander Hafiz Saeed.

item.title: Suspect in shooting at Trump press dinner to appear in court
item.description: A suspect in the shooting at a dinner event for Trump supporters will appear in court. The incident occurred during a press conference where Trump was present. Mr. Trump said at a hastily arranged late-night news conference at the White House that he first thought the noise was a tray being dropped, before realising it was gunfire.

item.title: Trump Lashes Out At Reporter For "Reading Shooter's Crap"
item.description: President Trump responded to a shooting by blaming Democratic leaders for "hate speech" that he claimed contributed to the violence. He made the comment while addressing the media. The president blamed "hate speech" by Democratic leaders for the political violence in America.

item.title: US strike kills three on alleged narco boat as campaign death toll hits 185
item.description: A US military strike killed three men on a boat allegedly used for narco-trafficking in the Eastern Pacific Ocean. The strike brings the death toll from the US campaign to at least 185.

item.title: Lebanon says Israel strikes kill 14 in deadliest day since truce
item.description: Israeli strikes in Lebanon killed 14 people, marking the deadliest day since a truce began. At least 36 people have been killed since the truce started, according to Health Ministry figures.

item.title: 6.2 Magnitude Earthquake Hits Japan's Hokkaido Island, No Tsunami Alert
item.description: A 6.2 magnitude earthquake hit Japan's Hokkaido Island with no tsunami alert issued. The area is at high risk of more quakes of similar strength in the coming week. Risks of more quakes of a similar strength in the area in the coming week are high.

item.title: Putin To Meet Iran's Abbas Araghchi
item.description: Russian President Putin is set to meet with Iran's Abbas Araghchi. Russia and Tehran have developed a close relationship due to Western sanctions. Russia and Tehran, both subject to Western sanctions, have developed an increasingly close relationship.

item.title: Satellite images show scale of Israeli destruction of south Lebanon towns
item.description: Satellite images reveal the Israeli military's damage to south Lebanon towns. The images show the massive scale of destruction. Satellite images taken reveal the Israeli military's massive scale of damage to towns in south Lebanon.

item.title: Iran offers US new proposal seeking to reopen Strait of Hormuz, end war: Report
item.description: Iran has offered the US a new proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end the war. Details of the proposal have not been disclosed. Iran offers US new proposal seeking to reopen Strait of Hormuz, end war: Report.

item.title: Oil prices rise amid stalled US-Iran peace talks
item.description: Brent crude oil prices rose over 2 percent after the US and Iran failed to hold a second round of peace talks in Pakistan, stalling diplomatic efforts. The stalled talks led to an increase in oil prices.

item.title: Oil Jumps, Stock Futures Slip As US-Iran Talks Stall
item.description: Benchmark Brent crude futures rose over 2% to a three-week high. Stock futures slipped as US-Iran talks stalled. Benchmark Brent crude futures rose more than two per cent to touch a three-week high.

item.title: ‘I’m not a pedophile… you are a disgrace’: Trump snaps at reporter over shooter ‘manifesto’
item.description: Former US President Trump responded to a reporter's question about a shooter's manifesto. Trump denied being a pedophile and called the reporter "disgrace". ‘I’m not a pedophile you are a disgrace’: Trump snaps at reporter over shooter ‘manifesto’.

item.title: US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: US Must Lift Blockade Before Fresh Talks, Iran Tells Pakistan
item.description: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian told Pakistani PM Shehbaz Sharif that the US must lift its blockade before fresh talks can begin. This was stated during a phone call on Saturday night. The blockade is seen as an operational obstacle to negotiations.

item.title: Magnitude 6.2 earthquake shakes part of northern Japan
item.description: A magnitude 6.2 earthquake struck northern Japan, causing no immediate reports of damage or casualties. The quake occurred at 11:36 PM local time on Saturday. Its epicenter was in the Aomori prefecture.

item.title: Khalid Ben-Srhir And Moroccan Historiography Of International Relations
item.description: This article does not provide any new information. It appears to be a biographical analysis of Khalid Ben-Srhir's work in Moroccan historiography of international relations. No concrete details are given.
